parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, data: null, error: 'Unauthorized' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: { topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, message: 'TTS workflow started' }, error: null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $json[0]?.project_id, topic_id: $('Webhook Trigger').item.json.body.topic_id, stage: 'audio', action: 'started', details: { pending_scenes: $json.length } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ input: { text: $json.narration_text }, voice: { languageCode: 'en-US', name: 'en-US-Chirp3-HD-Charon' }, audioConfig: { audioEncoding: 'MP3', sampleRateHertz: 24000 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_status: 'uploaded', audio_duration_ms: $('Compute Timeline').item.json.audio_duration_ms, audio_file_drive_id: $json.id || null, audio_file_url: $json.webViewLink || null, start_time_ms: $('Compute Timeline').item.json.start_time_ms, end_time_ms: $('Compute Timeline').item.json.end_time_ms }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_progress: 'done:' + $('Compute Timeline').item.json.scenes_completed + '/' + $('Set Cumulative Start').item.json.total_scenes, total_cost: $('Compute Timeline').item.json.total_tts_cost, cost_breakdown: { tts: $('Compute Timeline').item.json.total_tts_cost } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ audio_status: 'failed' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $json.project_id, topic_id: $json.topic_id, stage: 'audio', action: 'stopped', details: { reason: 'stopped_by_user', scenes_completed: $json.scenes_completed, scenes_failed: $json.scenes_failed } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'images', audio_progress: 'complete', last_status_change: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ project_id: $('Compile Summary').item.json.project_id, topic_id: $('Compile Summary').item.json.topic_id, stage: 'audio', action: 'completed', details: { scenes_completed: $('Compile Summary').item.json.scenes_completed, scenes_failed: $('Compile Summary').item.json.scenes_failed, total_duration_ms: $('Compile Summary').item.json.total_duration_ms, total_tts_cost: $('Compile Summary').item.json.total_tts_cost } }) }}
